title: green or blue
wikitext:
[]: green or blue             Quote Post by Hand of God » Wed Sep 07, 2005 9:19 pm I have seen a lot of pictures of Asuka, a lot, but why in some of them her eyes are green and on another they r blue?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Sep 07, 2005 10:02 pm Examples please? I've never seen Asuka with green eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Thu Sep 08, 2005 7:12 am Iv'e seen one before. It took that whole "I'm very sexy" attitude of hers away. I would have to say blue!

[]:             Quote Post by Hiromakuta » Fri Sep 09, 2005 6:48 am Sometimes theyÂ´re green because when she pisses off a person so much, that person pisses in her eyes (or iris to be precise), therefore, they become green

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Fri Sep 09, 2005 8:53 am Maybe you're colorblind ? :S

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Sep 09, 2005 12:03 pm Again, I know not where this comes from, though in some instances, such as fan art, and some official illustrations, the colors vary. In the show though, the colors are fairly consistant, its the way the characters are illustrated that varies.

[]:             Quote Post by wrack » Fri Sep 09, 2005 12:28 pm Time to go off-topic: Shinji's eyes are in some art work, mainly manga, brown instead of blue. Did Sadamoto forget, or is this some kinda super artistic way to show that the Shinji in the manga isn't exactly the same as in the anime?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Sep 14, 2005 9:31 am Actually, Sadamoto isn't the only one who will give Shinji brown eyes. Shunji Suzuki does, too.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Wed Sep 14, 2005 9:36 pm WoW what Shinji has blue eyes... I gata watch eva again everything is bleding into one colour bloob for me.

[]:             Quote Post by K2Grey » Wed Sep 14, 2005 10:58 pm I think Sadamoto goes with more realistic color schemes. Shinji having blue eyes is a neat touch, though...it's nice how most of the "anime colors" deal are somewhat muted in NGE, but still present, like with Misato's subtly purple hair, the blue eyes, Rei having a good reason for her bizarre hair/eye colors, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 15, 2005 3:37 am K2Grey wrote: I think Sadamoto goes with more realistic color schemes.
